Provides detail of device event when the event occurs on a printer.

DeviceEventsService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.device.events
DeviceEventsService provides interfaces to get detail of device event which occurs on a printer.
DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.device.events
AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the DeviceEventsService operations.
DeviceService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.device
DeviceService provides interfaces to get device information.
DeviceSettingsService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.device.settings
Provides interfaces for updating device settings.
DeviceToken - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
DeviceToken object to return certain token from a device.
DeviceUsageInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage
Class for accessing usage information from a printer.
DeviceUsageService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage
Class for providing interfaces to retrieve usage information from a printer.
